about.title: About Nutri Red
about.problem_p1: Finding the right nutritionist is harder than it should be. The market is fragmented: some nutritionists have an Instagram presence, others have personal websites, some appear in outdated directories. There's no centralized way to compare, verify credentials, or see prices transparently.
about.problem_p2: And once you find a nutritionist, managing the service is equally fragmented: WhatsApp for chat, email for meal plans, loose PDFs, spreadsheets. There's no continuity or clear follow-up.
about.problem_p3: For nutritionists, the situation is equally complicated. Getting new clients requires constant marketing across multiple channels. Managing clients means juggling multiple tools. And business models (high commissions, platforms that control pricing) don't always benefit the professional.
about.solution_p1: Nutri Red connects people with certified nutritionists transparently and securely. We're the all-in-one platform for discovering, connecting, and working with professional nutritionists.
about.solution_p2_for_clients: For clients: Search by specialty, city, language, and price. Compare profiles, read reviews, and connect for free. Receive your nutrition and exercise plans, chat with your nutritionist, and track your progress — all in one place.
about.solution_p3_for_nutritionists: For nutritionists: Create your professional profile, get more clients, and manage all your work (plans, chat, follow-up) from a single platform. No per-client commissions — just a fixed monthly subscription based on your volume.
about.difference_verified_desc: All professionals on our platform are certified and licensed. We verify their credentials before approving their profiles.
about.difference_transparent_desc: Every nutritionist publicly posts their rates. No hidden fees, no surprises. You know exactly what you'll pay before connecting.
about.difference_complete_desc: Nutrition plans, exercise plans, chat, progress tracking — all integrated. You don't need multiple apps or external tools.
about.difference_free_desc: Nutritionists maintain subscriptions with us. Clients connect for free and pay only for the nutritionist's services, with no additional commissions.
about.difference_commitment_desc: Cancel anytime. No long-term contracts or penalties. Both clients and nutritionists have total freedom.
about.difference_fair_desc: Nutritionists keep 100% of their income. No per-client commissions. Just a fixed, transparent monthly subscription.
about.mission_p1: Our mission is to make access to professional nutrition as easy as finding a good restaurant online. We want anyone, regardless of where they live or their budget, to be able to find and work with a certified nutritionist who understands their needs.
about.mission_p2: And for nutritionists, we want to offer a platform that really helps them grow their practice, without sacrificing their income or professional autonomy.
about.team_p1: We're a small team of professionals passionate about nutrition and technology. We believe technology should serve people, not the other way around. That's why we're building Nutri Red with transparency, simplicity, and respect for both clients and professionals.
about.team_p2: We're in early stage (MVP) and constantly improving. If you have questions, suggestions, or feedback, we'd love to hear from you at

how.title: Your path to better nutrition
how.intro: Finding the right nutritionist and starting your transformation journey is simpler than you think. At Nutri Red, everything is designed so you can focus on what matters: your health and your goals.
how.step_1_desc: Use our filters to find nutritionists that fit what you need. You can search by:
how.step_1_specialty: Specialty: Sports nutrition, clinical, paediatric, vegan...
how.step_1_city: City: Find professionals near you or with online consultations
how.step_1_language: Language: Make sure you can communicate comfortably
how.step_1_price: Price: Compare rates and choose what fits your budget
how.step_1_profiles: Each profile includes the nutritionist's bio, experience, specialties, and reviews from other clients. This way you can make an informed decision.
how.step_2_desc: Once you find the ideal nutritionist, simply click "Connect". Using the platform is completely free for you as a client — you only pay the nutritionist directly for their professional services.
how.step_2_request: The nutritionist will receive your request and can review your profile. Once they accept, you can agree on service details and start working together.
how.step_3_desc: Your nutritionist will create a plan tailored to your needs, goals, and lifestyle:
how.step_3_nutrition: Nutrition plan: Weekly menus, recipes, dietary guidelines
how.step_3_exercise: Exercise plan: Personalized routines to complement your nutrition
how.step_3_chat: Real-time chat: Resolve questions, share your progress, receive continuous support
how.step_3_integrated: All in one place. No need for multiple apps or tools. Your nutritionist can adjust your plan as needed, adapting to your progress.
how.faq_1_q: How much does it cost for me as a client?
how.faq_1_a: Using Nutri Red is completely free for clients. There are no fees for registering, searching for nutritionists, or connecting with them. The nutritionist sets their own rate for their professional services, which you pay directly to them — no hidden commissions or platform charges.
how.faq_2_q: What does the nutritionist's service include?
how.faq_2_a: Each nutritionist defines their own service packages, but typically they include: personalized nutrition plan, exercise plan (optional), ongoing chat support, adjustments based on your progress, and support for answering questions. Check each nutritionist's profile to see exactly what they offer.
how.faq_3_a: Yes, you can cancel your relationship with a nutritionist anytime from your dashboard. No long-term commitments. If you're not satisfied, you can search and connect with another professional without any issues.
how.faq_4_a: Yes. All nutritionists on Nutri Red are certified and licensed professionals. We verify their credentials before approving their profiles on the platform.
how.faq_5_q: How do I communicate with my nutritionist?
how.faq_5_a: Once connected, you can chat with your nutritionist directly within the platform. The chat is private and secure. You don't need to use WhatsApp, email, or other external tools.
how.faq_6_q: How long do nutritionists take to respond?
how.faq_6_a: Response time depends on each nutritionist and their workload. Most respond within 24-48 hours. Some offer faster support as part of their premium packages. Check the nutritionist's profile to see their typical response times.
how.faq_7_q: What happens to my personal data?
how.faq_7_a: Your data is protected and private. Only your nutritionist can see the information you share with them. We don't sell or share your data with third parties. Read our

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing or using Nutri Red ("the platform", "we", "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you don't agree with any part of these terms, you cannot use the platform.
terms.eligibility_age: You must be at least 18 years old to use Nutri Red
terms.eligibility_info: You must provide truthful, complete, and current information when registering
terms.eligibility_legal: You cannot use the service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
terms.eligibility_jurisdiction: You cannot violate any laws in your jurisdiction when using the platform
terms.account_client_unlimited: You can search and connect with nutritionists unlimitedly
terms.account_client_no_charge: No fees for using the platform
terms.account_client_direct: You pay the nutritionist directly for their professional services
terms.account_nutritionist_subscription: Require active subscription (Free, Pro, or Premium)
terms.account_nutritionist_verification: Subject to credential verification before approval
terms.account_nutritionist_limits: Active client limits by tier (5 / 25 / unlimited)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: Welcome to Nutri Red ("we", "our" or "the platform"). We're committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This privacy policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, and what your rights are.
privacy.intro_platform: Nutri Red is a Spain-based platform that connects clients with certified nutritionists. By using our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.
